news.title: Homegrown tech platform Metadise aims to drive Sarawak's digital leap forward
news.excerpt: Metadise is highlighted as a homegrown platform supporting Sarawak's digital transformation through practical technology initiatives.

news.title: Metadise's grand opening a boost for Sarawak's tech future
news.excerpt: Sarawak Tribune covers the launch of Metadise's headquarters and academy, highlighting its mission to accelerate digital talent development in Sarawak.
